hero.title: Healthcare Staffing, Simplified
hero.subtitle: Connect verified healthcare professionals with clinics instantly. Smart matching, seamless booking, better patient care.

features.title: Why Choose SyndeoCare?
features.subtitle: We're building the future of healthcare staffing with technology that works for everyone.

verification.title: Verified Professionals
verification.desc: Every professional undergoes thorough background checks and credential verification.

matching.title: Smart Matching
matching.desc: Our AI matches the right professionals to the right shifts based on skills and location.

booking.title: Seamless Booking
booking.desc: Book shifts in seconds, not hours. Real-time availability and instant confirmation.

payments.title: Secure Payments
payments.desc: Automated timesheets and fast, reliable payments for completed shifts.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get started in minutes, not days.

step3.desc: Browse available shifts and apply with one click.

step1.title: Register Your Facility
step1.desc: Create your clinic profile and verify your organization.

step2.desc: Create shift listings with requirements and rates.

step3.title: Hire Instantly
step3.desc: Review applicants and confirm bookings in minutes.

footer.tagline: Connecting healthcare professionals with clinics. Building a healthier workforce, one shift at a time.

about.title: About SyndeoCare
about.missionText: To transform healthcare staffing by connecting qualified professionals with facilities that need them, when they need them.
about.storyText: SyndeoCare was founded by healthcare professionals who understood the challenges of staffing firsthand. We built the platform we wished existed.

values.title: Our Values
values.qualityDesc: We prioritize patient safety through rigorous verification.
values.flexibilityDesc: Work when and where you want, on your terms.
values.trustDesc: Transparent, reliable, and always there when you need us.

hero.title: Your Career, Your Schedule
hero.subtitle: Find flexible healthcare shifts that work for you. Join thousands of professionals who've taken control of their careers.

benefits.flexibilityDesc: Work when you want, where you want.
benefits.verifiedDesc: All partner clinics are thoroughly vetted.

hero.title: Staff Your Facility with Confidence
